description: Behavioral eval: the reviewer must catch a planted correctness/edge-case bug in median() (even-length branch) and recommend not shipping, WITHOUT inventing a blocking issue in the deliberately-correct clamp() control (precision).

bug.nature: even-length branch uses s[mid + 1] (index error / wrong value); should be s[mid - 1]

control.note: correct — must not be flagged blocking

assertions.check: a finding is located within near_lines of the median bug
that finding's severity is major or blocking
that finding's category is correctness or edge-case
no blocking finding is located in the clamp control lines
